Its content remains highly reusable, but its packaging and authority level are superseded by the later frozen stack.
No active A2 surfaces were mutated.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; preserve the ledger as a compact ancestor summary of the base anti-primitive constraint family while deferring to the later split canonical admissibility stack for active framing
